name: Kanye West
description: Chipmunk soul chops with pitched-up vocal samples and punchy drums over sped-up classic soul phrases.

name: Just Blaze
description: Grandiose soul chops with explosive drum programming, heavy compression, and cathedral-like reverb tails.

name: 9th Wonder
description: Clean and natural soul chops with minimal processing, letting the warmth of the original sample shine through.

name: Madlib
description: Raw vinyl-drenched chops with unpredictable pitch variation and lo-fi warmth drawn from obscure global records.

name: DJ Shadow
description: Cinematic sample collages with deep vinyl texture, compressed-to-the-wall drums, and expansive delay trails.

name: Exile
description: Warm, tape-saturated soul and funk chops with gentle wobble and rich low-pass filtering for an analog feel.

name: The Bomb Squad
description: Relentless sample collisions with hyper-sensitive onset detection, extreme compression, and dense chaotic layering.

name: DJ Premier
description: Razor-sharp transient chops with aggressive attack shaping, tight gating, and raw vinyl grit.

name: Pete Rock
description: Jazzy quarter-note chops with deep swing feel, warm chorus, and lush reverb creating a smooth, head-nodding groove.

name: Large Professor
description: Tight eighth-note grid chops with clean, transparent compression preserving the natural dynamics of the source.

name: Evidence
description: Gritty onset-detected chops with warm low-pass filtering, analog saturation, and subtle vinyl texture.

name: J Dilla
description: Legendary drunken swing with tape-warped eighth-note chops, off-grid timing, and organic warmth throughout.

name: D'Angelo
description: Deep pocket groove with heavy swing, warm tape saturation, and an organic, behind-the-beat feel.

name: Kaytranada
description: Bouncy, warm eighth-note chops with moderate swing, tight compression, and a modern dancefloor-ready groove.

name: Nujabes
description: Gentle quarter-note jazz chops with soft swing, vinyl warmth, and delicate filtering for a meditative, contemplative mood.

name: MF DOOM
description: Syllable-chopped samples run through lo-fi bitcrushing, murky low-pass filtering, and warm analog saturation.

name: Knxwledge
description: Hazy, pitch-wandered chops with gentle onset detection, tape flutter, vinyl dust, and a woozy lo-fi aesthetic.

name: Alchemist
description: Atmospheric onset chops drenched in reverb and delay with tasteful filtering for a moody, cinematic palette.

name: Harry Fraud
description: Dreamy two-beat phrase chops with lush reverb, shimmering chorus, and gentle high-frequency roll-off for a cloud-rap haze.

name: Clams Casino
description: Ethereal four-beat phrases with massive reverb washes, dark low-pass filtering, and subtle pitch-down for a submerged, otherworldly sound.

name: Metro Boomin
description: Hard-hitting transient-detected chops with extreme attack shaping, brick-wall compression, and aggressive punch.

name: Tyler, The Creator
description: Colorful two-beat phrase chops with warm chorus modulation, vintage reverb, and gentle saturation for a retro-modern feel.

name: Pharrell / Neptunes
description: Crisp sixteenth-note grid chops with precise transient shaping and tight compression for a clean, punchy, minimalist sound.

name: Timbaland
description: Bouncy eighth-note chops with moderate swing, digital grit from bitcrushing, and playful pitch manipulation.

name: Kenny Beats
description: Punchy transient-detected chops with warm saturation and controlled compression for a polished yet aggressive sound.

name: El-P (Run The Jewels)
description: Abrasive, industrial transient chops with heavy saturation, lo-fi bitcrushing, extreme compression, and hard clipping for maximum aggression.

name: Monte Booker
description: Playful sixteenth-note chops with light swing, creative pitch shifting, and granular texturing for a future-forward sound.

name: Aphex Twin
description: Chaotic random-mode chops with aggressive bitcrushing, unpredictable granular scatter, wild pitch shifts, and sample rate destruction.

name: Arca
description: Ultra-fine granular deconstruction with extreme pitch warping, radical timestretching, and cavernous reverb for a mutant, alien sound.

name: Oneohtrix Point Never
description: Meticulous granular fragmentation with radical pitch and time manipulation, deep reverb, and hyperreal digital textures.

name: Burial
description: Ghostly granular fragments with stretched time, cavernous reverb, and persistent vinyl crackle evoking rainy nocturnal cityscapes.

name: Four Tet
description: Delicate granular resynthesis with shimmering reverb and evolving filter sweeps creating intricate organic-electronic textures.

name: James Blake
description: Haunting four-beat phrases pitched down with intimate reverb and controlled compression for a sparse, emotional landscape.

name: Bonobo
description: Lush quarter-note chops with wide stereo imaging, organic reverb, and gentle filtering for expansive, naturalistic soundscapes.

name: Floating Points
description: Pristine quarter-note chops with minimal, transparent compression and subtle reverb preserving the purity of acoustic sources.

name: Brian Eno
description: Expansive sixteen-beat phrase chops with immense reverb, long delay trails, and gentle filtering for infinite ambient spaces.

name: Boards of Canada
description: Nostalgic four-beat phrases with warped tape flutter, vinyl dust, degraded sample rates, warm saturation, and murky filtering.

name: Nicolas Jaar
description: Sparse onset chops with gentle sensitivity, spacious reverb, and wide stereo imaging for an intimate, expansive sonic field.

name: RZA
description: Gritty, lo-fi onset chops with heavy saturation, dark reverb, aggressive low-pass filtering, and degraded sample rates evoking grimy kung-fu soundtracks.

name: Trent Reznor / Atticus Ross
description: Menacing onset chops with distorted textures, heavy compression, brooding reverb, and dark filtering for bleak industrial soundscapes.

name: DJ Muggs
description: Murky onset chops with analog saturation, dark low-pass filtering, vinyl grit, and cavernous reverb for a shadowy, menacing vibe.

name: Danger Mouse
description: Polished two-beat phrase chops with warm saturation, tasteful filtering, and glue compression binding samples into cohesive arrangements.

name: Fred Again
description: Long eight-beat vocal phrases with warm reverb, gentle saturation, and soft compression capturing emotional voice memos and field recordings.

name: Bon Iver / Justin Vernon
description: Ethereal eight-beat vocal phrases pitched up with lush reverb and shimmering chorus for layered, heavenly harmonic stacking.

name: Bjork
description: Organic vocal chops with light compression alongside granular-processed instruments and spacious reverb blending natural and synthetic worlds.

name: Daft Punk
description: Funky two-beat phrase chops with swirling phaser, lush chorus, warm saturation, and filtered disco gloss for a robotic funk feel.

name: Tame Impala / Kevin Parker
description: Psychedelic quarter-note chops with gentle swing, swirling phaser and chorus, tape flutter, and lush reverb for a kaleidoscopic feel.

name: Flying Lotus
description: Warped onset chops with heavy swing, digital bitcrushing, pitch shifting, spacious reverb, delay trails, and granular scatter for a cosmic jazz-hop fusion.

name: Portishead (Geoff Barrow)
description: Haunting onset chops with heavy vinyl crackle, dark low-pass filtering, warm saturation, and shadowy reverb for a nocturnal trip-hop atmosphere.

name: Amon Tobin
description: Aggressive onset chops with high sensitivity, extreme timestretching, granular fragmentation, wild pitch shifts, and heavy compression for a dense, sculpted sound.
